title: Old X'Tingian
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Old X'Tingian''' was the original native language of the [[X'Ting]] species from [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]]. It was later replaced with [[X'Tingian]]. Old [[X'Tingian]] was mainly composed by different sounds and smells, that would later evolve to became the "written" form of X'Tingian.

Written Old [[X'Tingian]] used sets of hieroglyphs and pictograms, that were absolutely ruled out when the language evolved to [[X'Tingian]].

{{Language-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The Hive]]''
